productName: tasty tokes Infused Pre-roll Orange Creamsicle - 0.80g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Orange Creamsicle supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of orange, citrus, and vanilla, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe. Pace yourself.
